description: Output schema for non-combat item use results

outcome_schema.result_code: string — success | failed_check | invalid_item | no_charges | not_attuned | wrong_class
outcome_schema.effect_applied: string — description of the effect that was applied

effect_details.hp_change: number — healing or damage applied (0 if none)
effect_details.buff_applied: string — buff name if applicable (null otherwise)
effect_details.buff_duration: string — duration of buff (null if none)

outcome_schema.item_consumed: boolean — whether the item was consumed/destroyed
outcome_schema.charges_remaining: number — remaining charges after use (null if not applicable)
